name: Nectar
description: Nectar employee recognition and rewards platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Nectar
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new API token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Nectar → Settings → API Tokens → Create token
